<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the checklist below. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why it's needed. Link any related issue. -->

## How was it tested?

<!-- Commands run, hardware used, or manual steps. Be specific. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds locally (CI must also pass)
- [ ] Ran `clang-format -i` on changed C/C++ files (Google style, per `.clang-format`)
- [ ] Any pure-reformatting is in a **separate commit**
- [ ] New source files carry an SPDX header
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, per the DCO)
